CommentCaFonctionne.principle_10_body:
The company operates by following procedures written down in black and white.
1. If a problem occurs repeatedly, we put a system in place.
2. Each member has the responsibility to maintain their procedures.
3. We automate repetitive tasks of more than 3 hours.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_10_title: The Free Entrepreneur makes the most of their resources to create something new.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_11_body:
In every situation, we apply the simplest solution.
2. We avoid creating procedures for unique situations.
3. “One touch communication”: immediate processing to remain responsive.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_11_title: The Free Entrepreneur is an Actor: they decide quickly and act with determination.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_12_body:
1. Constant update of trainings.
2. Active listening to suggestions (communities, coaching, technical support).
3. Propose constructive alternatives when refusing.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_12_title: The Free Entrepreneur constantly brings more value to their clients.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_13_body: A currency saved is a currency earned for the company and its collaborators! We ensure that spending is done with the Strategic Objective in mind.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_13_title: The Free Entrepreneur manages their finances with discipline.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_14_body: When we have finished our workday, we disconnect completely. We value rest, healthy eating, and dynamic rituals to maintain positive energy.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_14_title: The Free Entrepreneur puts a touch of madness in their life.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_15_body: We constantly improve our knowledge and know-how by reading, training, and exchanging. We put our learning into practice immediately.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_15_title: The Free Entrepreneur inspires themselves from the best.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_16_body:
1. We lead by example by living a free life ourselves.
2. We provide maximum free value (videos, newsletters).
3. We maintain benevolent communication in all circumstances.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_16_title: The Free Entrepreneur inspires those who follow them.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_1_body: The goal of the Organization is to help more than one million French-speaking entrepreneurs become Free Entrepreneurs. All our actions, and the quarterly objectives of each team member, aim to achieve this goal.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_1_title: The Free Entrepreneur chooses a clear direction and sets ambitious goals.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_2_body: That's why we have put in writing our purpose, our Strategic Objective, in the Organization's Manifesto, why we have also transcribed our Operational Principles, and we take the time to create Work Procedures. We firmly believe that a company is defined as much by the temptations it declines as by the opportunities it seizes. For this reason, we regularly review our Strategic Objective before launching new projects – and we say "NO" to the majority of opportunities, so we can say "YES" to our mission.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_2_title: The Free Entrepreneur "looks straight ahead" and moves forward with determination because their goal is clear.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_3_body:
1. We work on the most important tasks first.
2. We spend as much time as possible on “non-urgent and important” tasks as defined by Stephen R. Covey: rather than jumping from crisis to crisis, we prioritize activities that follow the Strategic Objective. This is reflected, for example, in our team meetings where the major part of the meeting aims to move towards the Strategic Objective – and only the last part of the meeting is devoted to crises and “urgent” dossiers.
3. We do not multitask. When we communicate with someone, we are 100 percent present. When we follow a training or execute a mission, we cut off all potential sources of interruption.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_4_body: We actively fight this great enemy: Conformism. We have a vision of the company quite different from the “enclosing box” often associated with it. On the contrary, we build this company in the form of an Organization and Movement that allows us to express our creativity, live our values, and work with passion. We do not engage in a “race for profit”; we prefer to focus on providing maximum value to our clients. And paradoxically, this increases our profitability and allows the entire team to reap the fruits with stable remuneration, matching the efforts provided.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_4_title: The Free Entrepreneur always thinks bigger.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_5_body: The Free Entrepreneur knows that they have already accomplished a lot, and that the best is yet to come. We make it a point of honor to celebrate our accomplishments, large and small. That’s why we start our team meetings by congratulating members for their successes; and it’s also why we take the time for a relaxed “debriefing” moment after a major project or a seminar.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_6_body: We only work with people who deeply believe in our vision of the Free Entrepreneur. Our collaborators live their lives according to the values of the Free Entrepreneur and are aware of the importance of the mission entrusted to them: to transform millions of business owners and project carriers into Free Entrepreneurs!
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_6_title: The Free Entrepreneur sees themselves as the “Champion” of a cause – they transform lives.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_7_body: That is why we always continue to improve by drawing lessons from our past experiences. The work of the manager, managers, and department heads is to constantly create, supervise, and improve the company's systems. We are building a well-oiled machine operated by competent people – not a “patchwork” requiring sleight of hand or constant bailing out.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_7_title: The Free Entrepreneur is not afraid to fail.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_8_body:
1. We employ people who give 100% to their work, and we compensate them generously accordingly. When we are at work, we work hard, in a focused way, and in exchange, the company provides atmosphere and benefits.
2. “Words fly away, but writings remain”: we put everything clearly in writing.
3. Our workplace is impeccable: clean and orderly.
4. Our attire reflects our company: professional, sober.
5. We pay very special attention to the language.
6. We have every document proofread before publication.
7. Every event is announced in the agenda.
8. We keep our delivery promises.
9. We maintain our equipment 100% functional.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_8_title: The Free Entrepreneur is demanding of others… Because they are demanding of themselves.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_9_body:
Our work climate is serious and calm, but above all serene, soothing, and friendly. Everyone can give their best and be respected for the quality of their work and ideas.

1. We communicate regularly via “Stand-Ups”.
2. We do not use email communication within the team.
3. The onboarding and training of new collaborators are structured.
CommentCaFonctionne.principle_9_title: The Free Entrepreneur creates an entourage that supports and inspires them to go higher and higher.
CommentCaFonctionne.voici_les_principes: Here are the Operational Principles respected by every member of the ShiftUp team and the Free Entrepreneurs:

FounderSection.entrepreneur_et_conseille: Entrepreneur and advisor to small business owners, passionate about marketing and audiovisual, Nantenaina is shaking up the business coaching and digital marketing landscape.
FounderSection.fascin_par_loptimisation: Fascinated by constant optimization in different aspects that can radically transform our lives or results, he learns from the best entrepreneurs in various fields. His obsession lies in sharing concrete tools from his mentors in the most captivating and pedagogical way possible.
FounderSection.fondateur_et_dirigeant: Founder and CEO of ShiftUp, leading a team of 5 people, Nantenaina's clients include small business owners seeking growth and corporate executives wanting to enter the world of entrepreneurship.
FounderSection.il_accompagne_ces: He helps these individuals improve their performance and business growth.

NosEvenements.multipliez_votre_chiffre: Multiply Your Revenue is an intensive 3-day workshop designed as an 'accelerated MBA' for entrepreneurs. Learn to master the 5 pillars of growth to transition from executor to strategic leader. Leave with a concrete plan to boost your profits by 30% to 300%.

OrganismeContent.asset1: The absolute clarity of our goal, and our 'One Thing' approach: We decline temptations and stay focused on the strategic objective above,
OrganismeContent.asset2: Benevolent marketing that showcases our expertise: We apply our own advice!
OrganismeContent.asset3: Flawless quality: The content of our training must be based on concrete case studies.
OrganismeContent.asset4: Irreproachable pedagogy: At the cutting edge of tools and strategies to achieve the best results for entrepreneurs.
OrganismeContent.asset5: Great responsiveness: Answering entrepreneurs' questions and guiding them with expertise.
OrganismeContent.la_seule_faon: The only way to be free is to have a business with systems in place that generate sales on autopilot, without your intervention.
OrganismeContent.les_cinq_atouts: The five assets that will drive the success of our Organization are:
OrganismeContent.nous_atteindrons_cet: We will achieve this goal by sharing concrete advice, strategies, and tools on all media to create that 'click' for business owners.
OrganismeContent.pour_cela_il: To do this, you must bring more value than anyone else in your market – and set up simple systems to free up your time.

Testimonial.text1: An amazing training that totally changed my vision of business. The tools given are concrete and immediately applicable.
Testimonial.text2: ShiftUp allowed me to structure my offer and increase my rates. The community aspect is also a huge plus.
Testimonial.text3: Finally, a training adapted to the local context while keeping international standards. I highly recommend it!
Testimonial.text4: I loved the participatory approach. We don't just listen, we practice and exchange with passionate experts.
Testimonial.text5: The return on investment was immediate. The taught sales strategies are formidable.
